Gift Together, Celebrate Together

Social Connections

Gift giving is better together. Connect with your loved ones and make every celebration memorable.

Share Wishlists

Create and share gift wishlists with family & friends. Let them know exactly what you desire.

Group Gifting

Pool contributions from multiple people for that one special luxury gift. Make big dreams come true together.

Gift Chat

Discuss and plan gifts with your close circle. Share ideas, get opinions, and surprise together.

Celebration Reminders

Never miss a birthday, anniversary, or special occasion. Get AI-powered gift suggestions ahead of time.

Gift Registry

Set up your personal gift registry for weddings, housewarmings, and milestone celebrations.

Referral Rewards

Share 3BOXES with friends and earn luxury credits. Both of you get rewards on their first purchase.
